title: Splenic Artery Aneurysm Following Endoscopic Ultrasound Guided Fine-Needle Aspiration: A Rare Complication Presenting with Delayed Massive Gastrointestinal Bleeding.

sections.title: Splenic Artery Aneurysm Following Endoscopic Ultrasound Guided Fine-Needle Aspiration: A Rare Complication Presenting with Delayed Massive Gastrointestinal Bleeding.
sections.text: Cite this article as: Aykut H, Ordu B, Dertsiz B, Saruhan MA, Adali G. Splenic artery aneurysm following endoscopic ultrasound guided fine-needle aspiration: A rare complication presenting with delayed massive gastrointestinal bleeding. Turk J Gastroenterol. 2026;37(2):276-278.
